case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DORIA TORRES et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gwendolyn Washington, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Doria Torres.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- 14 Days Notice------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration for Proof of Service------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 963 Ellsworth St., San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Pas-due Rent $1,812.00
Holdover Damages $392.54
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $2,404.54
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CINDY LEE FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DORIA TORRES

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN CLERK:SHERIFE HUSENY; NOT REPORTED (218)
